case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. YAZMIN SANCHEZ PEREZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ PEREZ, YAZMIN $828.20 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $898.20, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $828.20 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ PEREZ, YAZMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP
